checks.name: api
findings: No API endpoints found at common paths
No GraphQL endpoint found
No CORS headers — API may not be accessible from browser-based agents
Server always returns HTML regardless of Accept header — no API content negotiation

No CAPTCHA detected on main page or login
No OAuth/OIDC discovery endpoint found
No login form found at common paths

robots.txt references a sitemap
No sitemap.xml found

checks.name: structure
findings: Heavy div usage: 557 divs with only 5 semantic elements
Poor accessibility: only 70/141 interactive elements have labels
Forms need work: 0/4 inputs have names, 2/4 have types
Found 23 elements with stable test selectors
Very little content without JavaScript
Multiple h1 headings (2) — ambiguous page title
Heading hierarchy has 1 level skip(s) (e.g., h1 → h3)
Good link accessibility: 59/59 links are descriptive

checks.name: errors
findings: 404 returns HTML error page (not machine-readable)
No rate limit headers found
Unexpected status 403 for DELETE on main page

checks.name: cost
findings: Page is ~81,496 tokens raw — very expensive for agents (>15,000 threshold)
Signal-to-noise ratio is 1% — most of the page is noise
Inline scripts/styles are 0% of page — reasonable
Max DOM depth is 37 — deeply nested structure
CSS class attributes consume ~8,721 tokens (11% of page)
Reading this page costs $0.10–$1.22 per load ($0.51–$6.11 for a 5-page session)

checks.name: a11y
findings: Good landmark coverage: contentinfo, main, navigation
All 5 images have alt attributes (5 descriptive, 0 decorative)
Found 1 skip link(s) — helps agents jump to main content
Found 1 live region(s) — agents can detect dynamic content changes
61 custom elements made focusable via tabindex=0
6 elements with tabindex=-1 (programmatic focus)

checks.name: performance
findings: Fast response: 80ms
Moderate payload: 318KB
No redirects — direct access
Resource heavy: 12 scripts, 10 stylesheets
Compression enabled: gzip
